Me, The Timeline

Early

  • Born 1994, southwest China
to enhance awareness, alieviate victim stress, mediate communication, etc, with the full aware of potential ethical challenge. For example, GenAI mediated communication
  • Q: What happened during at Cornell?
  • Q: What happened these years?
  • Q: What are my factors to be a fantastic prey? A: Well, harsh question but I did go through them:
    • Q: What are the bugs?
    • Q: Why aren't those reported timely? A: That's why I have to write this, or the hurt would be non-terminating. Don't let this happen again. Or just make this happen less.
    • Q: Anyone else involved in this work? A: Not yet. Nor did I distribute the work to others although the domain is publicly available, i.e. can be cited.
    • Q: What to expect from the readers? A: The most desired things is professional critique and/or discussion on this work. Still, like a baby begging for mom's attention. Research collaboration will be surprisingly great.
